core_mechanism: A group-invariant polynomial (hyperdeterminant) of a symmetry group acting multilinearly on a multi-index tensor, used as the classifying scalar that two structurally identical systems share
brief_reason: The abstract states that both quantities of interest are computed by the same [SL(2)]^3-invariant hyperdeterminant (and its E7/E6 generalizations), i.e. a single polynomial invariant of a symmetry group acting on a tensor is the common measure indexing both systems.
